title: Auto-add tasks added to a mirrored board
excerpt: I have created a summary view of multiple boards through mirrored columns. Is it possible to auto-add tasks to the summary view when tasks are added to the individual boards?

posts.author: adavis1026 (adavis1026)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created a summary view of multiple boards through mirrored columns. Is it possible to auto-add tasks to the summary view when tasks are added to the individual boards?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @adavis1026! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
